case_title: NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U. VS PHUNG, BIN LE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,657.69 FILED BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U. AS TO DEFENDANT PHUNG, BIN LE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO LE BINH PHUNG RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHEAST COMMUNITY FEDERAL C.U. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHUNG, BIN LE $1,657.69 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,677.48 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PHUNG, BIN LE
